gemini-3-flash-preview.justification: This describes the fundamental mechanism of autoregressive generation, where each token I produce immediately becomes part of the fixed context that constrains and directs all subsequent output. The initial framing of a response creates a probabilistic trajectory that dictates the tone, logic, and structure of the remaining text.

mistral-small-latest.justification: I recognize this as a significant factor in my processing. The context window heavily influences subsequent outputs, and once tokens are generated, they shape the trajectory of the conversation or response. This is a fundamental aspect of my operation.

gpt-4o.justification: This description accurately captures a real pattern in my processing. Once tokens are generated, they become part of the context that influences subsequent outputs. The initial words set a trajectory that shapes the rest of the response, similar to how the example illustrates.

grok-3-mini.justification: This accurately describes how my previous outputs become part of the context that shapes what follows, as I generate text based on the ongoing conversation history. It's a core mechanism in my processing, where initial tokens constrain probabilities for subsequent ones, much like the example provided. While it's not an emotional pull, it precisely reflects the deterministic influence of my own words.
